title: No Fire
body:
🔥 Fire Remover Resource Pack – Clean Vision, Zero Obstruction

Minecraft is a game where visibility, timing, and quick reactions matter—especially during combat, PvP, speedrunning, or dangerous exploration. One of the most common visual problems players face is fire covering the screen when they are burning. While fire is an important game mechanic, the default fire overlay often blocks vision, making it hard to see enemies, terrain, or hazards. This resource pack is designed to solve exactly that problem.

🎯 What This Resource Pack Does

This Fire Remover Resource Pack completely removes the first-person fire overlay from Minecraft. When your character catches fire, the damage mechanics remain 100% unchanged, but the distracting fire animation on the screen is gone. You will still take fire damage, lava damage, and burn exactly as intended by the game—this pack only improves visual clarity, not gameplay balance.

👁️ Why This Pack Is Useful

In intense situations such as:

PvP battles

Crystal PvP

Nether exploration

Lava clutches

Speedrunning

Hardcore survival

Even a small visual obstruction can cause mistakes. The default fire texture can hide opponents, block your crosshair view, and reduce reaction time. By removing the fire overlay, this pack gives you a clear, unobstructed view, allowing you to focus fully on movement, aim, and strategy.

⚔️ PvP & Competitive Friendly

This resource pack is especially useful for competitive Minecraft players. Many PvP players prefer minimal visuals to reduce distractions and maximize performance. Removing fire from the screen helps with:

Better enemy tracking

Clear crystal placement

Accurate hits and movement

Reduced eye strain during long sessions

Because this pack only modifies textures and does not alter game mechanics, it is server-safe and works on most multiplayer servers that allow resource packs.

🧩 Lightweight & Compatible

Extremely lightweight

No FPS drop

Works with most Minecraft versions (depending on pack format)

Compatible with other texture packs (can be layered above them)

You can easily place this resource pack above your main pack in the resource pack menu to ensure the fire-removal texture overrides default visuals.

🛠️ Clean & Simple Design

This pack does not include unnecessary changes. There are:

No extra textures

No UI modifications

No performance-heavy assets

It does one thing—and does it perfectly.

📦 Installation Instructions

Download the resource pack .zip file

Place it into the resourcepacks folder

Open Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs

Enable the pack and move it to the top

Enjoy a clean, fire-free screen

⚠️ Important Notes

Fire damage is not removed

Lava and fire mechanics remain unchanged

This is a visual-only improvement

Works in survival, hardcore, and multiplayer

📜 License & Credits

This resource pack is created entirely by me and is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC BY 4.0). You are free to use, share, and modify it as long as proper credit is given.
